name: GCM Grosvenor Inc.
summary: Our Company Over our 54-year history we have prided ourselves on our client-centric approach to alternative asset management. As a leading global solutions provider, we invest across all major alternative investment strategies and are highly flexible in how we structure our solutions, so that we can work to meet each clients specific needs. As of December31, 2025, we had $90.9 billion in AUM. Our central objectives are to provide our clients with choice, deliver innovative alternative investment...
